title: Sidekicks
overview: 'Sidekicks' is half-hourlong US action series that aired in primetime during the 1986–1987 television season on ABC. Its backdoor-pilot 'The Last Electric Knight' aired in Febuary 1986 as part of 'The Disney Sunday Movie' line-up on ABC. The series follows young martial arts expert Ernie Lee and his guardian, police detective Jake Rizzo.
creator: Dan Gordon

episodes.title: Sidekicks - Ernie Reyes Jr., Gil Gerard, Keye Luke
